text.title: Outcome Based Roadmaps Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Outcome Based Roadmaps end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: attach-baselines
step.action: Pull current metric value from dashboard; record source URL.

step.name: list-candidates
step.action: List 3-6 to-validate solutions per outcome + explicit not-doing list.

step.name: publish-and-lock
step.action: Freeze outcomes; publish internal + (optional) external derivative view.
